mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM eb_program_task t WHERE t.program_id = #{programId} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM eb_program_task t WHERE t.program_id = #{programId} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.status IN (0, 1)
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(t.sort), 0) FROM eb_program_task t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.pid = #{pid} AND t.program_id = #{programId}
SELECT DISTINCT m.task_id FROM eb_program_task_member m WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.uid = #{uid}
SELECT t.* FROM eb_program_task t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.path LIKE CONCAT('%/', #{ancestorId}, '/%')
